title: tuberaria guttata var. cinerea
intro: Tuberaria guttata var. cinerea, also known as the Grey Tuberaria, is a flowering plant species in the Cistaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tuberaria guttata var. cinerea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and sometimes used in herbal remedies to support skin health and immune function.
